revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-160

The minimum time interval by which two events must be separated to be distinguishable, in a navigation system, by the time measurement alone.

Reference: I.R.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
